summary: End-to-end testing of My Pay invoice discounting MVP. All 20 backend pytest tests pass. All critical frontend flows verified end-to-end: landing, creator login -> dashboard, new deal (Nike Net 45, $20k) -> risk gauge + AI memo on detail page, admin login -> portfolio stats + deals table, override modal. AI (Claude Sonnet 4.5 via emergentintegrations) is returning real structured JSON - verified live. RBAC enforced (creator blocked from /api/admin/*).

issues: React hydration console warning: '<span> cannot be a child of <option>'. Caused by emergent editor's injected wrapper spans inside <option> elements, not a real app bug. No user-visible impact, but worth noting.

critical_code_review_comments: risk_engine.py: term_penalty linearly scales past 30d — for Net 90 this becomes 9 pts off. Acceptable for MVP.

server.py line 286: /creator/profile PUT returns doc with an id computed via `existing['id']` inside dict comprehension — when existing is None this generates a new uuid but doesn't store it since insert path already set doc['id']. Harmless but odd; consider returning the actual persisted id.
server.py: `_creator_health_composite` is duplicated between server.py (`_creator_health_score`) and risk_engine.py. Minor DRY violation.
server.py: Deal creation stores contract_file_b64 inline in MongoDB; for large PDFs consider GridFS or object storage post-MVP.

server.py line 420: `outstanding = sum(a['total_advance'] for a in agg if a['_id'] == 'disbursed')` equals total_advanced — 'outstanding' should deduct repayments (noted as 'simplified' in code, fine for MVP).
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_-prefixed deals (Nike Summer Campaign, Pre-score Deal, UI Summer Campaign) and a TEST_<uuid> creator for each run. Not auto-cleaned but low volume.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest file /app/backend/tests/test_mypay_api.py uses module-scoped pytest attributes (pytest.deal_id, pytest.risk_score) to share state across TestDeals methods — run with default ordering. Nike fortune500/AAA + demo creator at Net 45 yields risk_score 89.4 (>= 85 requirement) and advance_rate 90% (within 90-95 band). AI analyze sometimes takes 15-30s; timeout set to 90s. Emergent-editor injects <span> inside <option> causing hydration warning — ignore.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found. All acceptance criteria met.
